ValidationRule.description: Set the Quantity Received to blank and status For Ordering if want to reset the receipt items.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Reset_Receipt__c ), Reset_Receipt__c = TRUE, OR( NOT(ISBLANK( Quantity_Received__c )), NOT( ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'For Ordering')) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not reset receipt if the Quantity Received has value or the status is not For Ordering.
